skill.name: sonoscli
skill.description: Control Sonos speakers from an AI assistant using the Sonos CLI for discovery, playback, volume, queues, groups, and troubleshooting.
skill.summary: Use the Sonos CLI to manage speakers on a local network.
skill.author: aiskillstore

security_audit.summary: This official skill provides usage guidance for the external Sonos CLI and targets local network speaker control. Static findings are expected for command execution and local network access, and no malicious behavior or prompt injection was found.

low_findings.title: Requires External CLI and Local Network Access
low_findings.description: The skill depends on the installed sonos command and local network speaker discovery. This is expected for Sonos control.

content.user_title: Control Sonos Speakers from the CLI
content.value_statement: Managing Sonos speakers from an assistant can be slow without exact commands. This skill gives Claude, Codex, and Claude Code concise Sonos CLI workflows.
actual_capabilities: Runs speaker discovery guidance with sonos discover.
Checks speaker status by name or direct IP address.
Controls playback with play, pause, stop, and queue commands.
Sets speaker volume using the Sonos CLI.
Manages groups, favorites, queues, and party mode.
Explains common network and sandbox permission errors.
limitations: Requires the external sonos binary to be installed.
Requires local network access to Sonos speakers.
Spotify Web API search needs separate Spotify credentials.
Cannot control speakers when the runtime sandbox blocks network access.

use_cases.title: Run Home Audio Commands
use_cases.description: Control playback and volume on named Sonos speakers from an assistant session.

use_cases.title: Troubleshoot Speaker Discovery
use_cases.description: Diagnose common SSDP, route, and sandbox errors when Sonos speakers are not found.

use_cases.title: Manage Shared Listening Areas
use_cases.description: Check groups, join speakers, unjoin rooms, or start party mode across a local network.

prompt_templates.title: Discover Speakers
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the Sonos speakers on my local network and summarize what you discover.

prompt_templates.title: Control a Room
prompt_templates.prompt: Pause the Kitchen Sonos speaker, then set its volume to 15 and confirm the current status.

prompt_templates.title: Fix Discovery Failure
prompt_templates.prompt: sonos discover failed with sendto: no route to host. Explain the likely cause and the next checks.

prompt_templates.title: Coordinate Multiple Speakers
prompt_templates.prompt: Check Sonos group status, join the Living Room and Kitchen speakers, then list the queue.

output_examples.output: The assistant runs a status check for the Kitchen speaker and reports playback state, volume, and any reachable device details.

output_examples.input: The Sonos discovery command says no route to host.
output_examples.output: The assistant explains that local network permission or routing may be blocked and suggests checking host network permissions or sandbox access.

output_examples.input: Put the downstairs speakers in party mode.
output_examples.output: The assistant checks group status, applies the requested grouping command, and confirms the resulting speaker group layout.

best_practices: Use clear speaker names or a direct IP address when discovery is unreliable.
Confirm local network permissions before running discovery from a sandboxed tool.
Keep Spotify credentials outside prompts and use environment variables when needed.
anti_patterns: Do not assume a speaker exists before running discovery or status checks.
Do not expose Spotify client secrets in chat history.
Do not retry blocked network commands without checking sandbox or host permissions.

faq.question: What does this skill control?
faq.answer: It helps an assistant use the Sonos CLI to control speakers, groups, queues, favorites, and volume.

faq.question: Does it install Sonos hardware support?
faq.answer: No. It expects the sonos command from sonoscli to be installed and available.

faq.question: Does it need internet access?
faq.answer: Basic speaker control uses the local network. Spotify search may require internet access and Spotify credentials.

faq.question: Can it work inside a sandbox?
faq.answer: It can work only if the sandbox permits local network access needed for Sonos discovery and control.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: What should I do if discovery fails?
faq.answer: Check local network permissions, sandbox settings, and the option to target a speaker with its IP address.
